title: readGDX — readGDX
text: Function read gdx files R. stripped-reimplementation readGDX now based magclass structures uses gamstransfer basis.

title: readGDX — readGDX
code: readGDX(   gdx,   ...,   format = "simplest",   type = NULL,   react = "warning",   followAlias = FALSE,   spatial = NULL,   temporal = NULL,   magpieCells = TRUE,   select = NULL,   restoreZeros = TRUE,   addAttributes = TRUE )

title: readGDX — readGDX
text: gdx file name gdx file ... search strings defining objects read gdx file, *-autocompletion. Can also vectors containing one search strings format Output format. Five choices currently available simple, simplest, first_found, name. Instead writing full format name format abbreviation shown . simple (s) returns list outputs. simplest (st) Behaves like "simple" one object returned. However, one object read gdx file magpie object returned getting rid surrounding list structure. recommended format interactive use. first_found (f) special format case like read exactly one object know exactly name object . , can list possible names object function return first object list found. especially useful writing read functions gdx outputs models names data object might change time function work model versions. format helps make gdx-based functions backwards compatible older versions gdx file different naming. raw (r) returns data comes gamstransfer::readGDX without data class conversion. name (n) case function returns name objects found gdx fit given search pattern given type vector. type Type objects extracted. Available options "Parameter", "Set", "Alias", "Variable" "Equation". NULL types considered. react determines reaction, object like read exist. Available options "warning" (NULL returned warning send object missing), "silent" (NULL returned, warning given) "error" (function throws error) followAlias bolean deciding whether alias linked set returned. spatial argument determine spatial columns dataframe converted magclass object. Defaults NULL. See .magpie information. temporal argument determine temporal columns dataframe converted magclass object. Defaults NULL. See .magpie information. magpieCells (boolean) determines whether set "j" gets special treatment replacing underscores set elements dots. Active default historical reasons. Can ignored cases. Makes difference, 1) GDX element depends set "j", 2) set "j" contains underscores. select preselection subsets data coming gdx using function mselect. Information provided list selections (e.g. select=list(type="level")). See mselect information. restoreZeros Defines whether 0s, typically stored gdx file, restored ignored output. default restored. possible, recommended use restore_zeros=TRUE. faster memory consuming. get memory errors use restore_zeros=FALSE addAttributes Boolean controls whether description gdxMetadata added attributes
